Flow.description:
Convert Aircraft Changed Workflow to Flow, It will update Asset Id and Asset Name whenever Asset Type or Serial Number(MSN Number) is changed and At the time of Asset Insertion it will update ISNEWAC value to T and also update Asset Id and Name field.
Rule to kick off when aircraft is created new or when the field "Data Verified For Accuracy (leaseworks__Data_Verified_For_Accuracy__c) is changed.
Flow.label: Aircraft Changed
